title: RM00F8 verify workflow parse clean
objective:
Run script:"""
from pathlib import Path
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
p=Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
t=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
checks={'exists':p.exists(),'no_archive_marker':'Moved to:' not in t and 'At:' not in t,'has_name':t.startswith('name: governance-validation-ci'),'manual_only':'workflow_dispatch:' in t and all(x not in t for x in ['push:','pull_request:','schedule:']),'has_jobs':'jobs:' in t and 'runs-on:' in t,'disabled_placeholder':'disabled-placeholder' in t or 'Disabled governance validation placeholder' in t}
passed=all(checks.values())
Path('governance/state').mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/state/RM00F8_WORKFLOW_PARSE_CLEAN.json').write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM00F8','trace_id':'rm00f8_verify_workflow_parse_clean_v2','status':'completed' if passed else 'blocked','utc_completed_at':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),'checks':checks,'release_pass':False,'next':'RM00F9 reconcile disabled workflows inventory' if passed else 'RM00F8 repair'},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+'\n',encoding='utf-8')
rows='\n'.join(f'- {k}: {v}' for k,v in checks.items())
Path('governance/reports/RM00F8_WORKFLOW_PARSE_CLEAN.md').write_text('# RM00F8 | Workflow parse clean verification\n\nStatus: '+('completed' if passed else 'blocked')+'\n\n## Checks\n'+rows+'\n\nRelease PASS remains false.\n',encoding='utf-8')
ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    s=ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    m='## RM00F8 completed | 2026-06-04'
    if m not in s:
        ctx.write_text(s.rstrip()+'\n'+m+'\nWorkflow parse-clean verification status: '+('completed' if passed else 'blocked')+'. Release PASS remains false. Next: '+('RM00F9 reconcile disabled workflows inventory' if passed else 'RM00F8 repair')+'. No issue comments.\n',encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/RM00F8_WORKFLOW_PARSE_CLEAN.json','governance/reports/RM00F8_WORKFLOW_PARSE_CLEAN.md','governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md'])
"""No issue comments.
